response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify content segments: intro, host talk (monologue), and song performance. 2. Identified the host as Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame and the show 'Now That's a Bop' from on-screen graphics. 3. Identified the performance segment of 'フライデイ・チャイナタウン' (Friday Chinatown) beginning at 04:34. 4. Identified original song credits: Music by Yasuha and Lyrics by Toyohisa Araki from the on-screen text. 5. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'フライデイ・チャイナタウン' in Japanese and found a reliable English translation. 6. Compiled all information and lyrics into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video starts with an intro segment for the show 'Now That's a Bop' on ERB TV, hosted by the character Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, followed by her vocal performance of the song 'フライデイ・チャイナタウン' (Friday Chinatown).

scenes.description: The video opens with an introductory collage and the 'ERB TV' logo, followed by host Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame introducing the show 'Now That's a Bop' and the night's special theme of music from the 80s.
Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame performs the song 'フライデイ・チャイナタウン' (Friday Chinatown). The song's title and credit information appear on screen.
scenes.song_title: フライデイ・チャイナタウン
